zh.London, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌
zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Manning於大約1335年出生在英國肯特布羅姆利時，他的父親William Manning28歲，母親Joan Chyrfold23歲。他於大約1360年與Catherine Chaucer在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1392年在英國倫敦享年58歲。

zh-hans.Bettred, Cudham, London Borough of Broml: 英国英格兰肯特達哈姆
zh-hans.London, London, England: 英国英格兰倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Manning于大约1335年出生在英国肯特布羅姆利时，他的父亲William Manning28岁，母亲Joan Chyrfold23岁。他于大约1360年与Catherine Chaucer在英国英格兰倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1392年在英国倫敦享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Manning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Mainnín ‘descendant of Mainnín’, probably an assimilated form of Mainchín, a diminutive of manach ‘monk’. This is the name of a chieftain family in Connacht. It is sometimes pronounced Ó Maingín and Anglicized as Mangan .
English: from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Manning.
North German and Dutch: habitational name from a farm so named, once in possession of a certain Manno (see Mann 2) and his kin.

variants.name: Mannen
meanings: Altered form of Irish or English   Manning  .

variants.name: Mannion
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Malachy, Brendan, Aislinn, Brigid, Ciaran, Declan, Dermot, Kieran, Liam, Maeve, Siobhan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mainnín (see Manning ).
English and Irish: variant of   Mangan  .

variants.name: Mangan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mongáin ‘descendant of Mongán’, a byname for someone with a luxuriant head of hair (from mong ‘hair, mane’).

variants.name: Mannings
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donovan, Eamonn, Ronan.
Irish: variant of Manning 1, with the addition of English excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Manning was born about 1335, in Bromley, Kent, England, his father, William Manning, was 28 and his mother, Joan Chyrfold, was 23. He married Catherine Chaucer about 1360, in St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1392, in London, England, at the age of 58.

fr.London, London, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Manning est né environ 1335, à Bromley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Manning, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Chyrfold, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Chaucer environ 1360, à St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1392, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.London, London, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Manning um 1335 in Bromley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Manning 28 und seine Mutter Joan Chyrfold 23. Er hat um 1360 in St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom Catherine Chaucer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 58 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Manning è nato il circa 1335 nel Bromley, Kent, England, il suo padre, William Manning, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Chyrfold, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Chaucer circa 1360, nel St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1392, nel London, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.London, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창
ko.lifeSummary: Simon Manning(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 켄트 브롬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Manning(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Chyrfold(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창에서 Catherine Chaucer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1392년 영국 런던에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Catherine Chaucer aproximadamente 1360, em St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Manning родился около 1335 г. в местности бромли, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William Manning было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Chyrfold, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Chaucer около 1360 г. в местности ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Catherine Chaucer aproximadamente 1360, en St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
